properties.name: ticker.client.enabled
properties.description: Register this app with a Ticker collector on startup and keep it fresh via heartbeat.

properties.name: ticker.client.collector-url
properties.description: Base URL of the Ticker collector, e.g. http://ticker:8080 (include its base-path if one is set). Required.

properties.name: ticker.client.url
properties.description: The URL the collector should poll THIS instance at. Leave unset to default to this machine's own http://<ip>:<server.port> — the right thing when N replicas share one config. Never point replicas at one shared/load-balanced URL.

properties.name: ticker.client.name
properties.description: Display name on the wall; defaults to spring.application.name. Replicas SHARE this — the wall groups by it and distinguishes instances by hostname:port.

properties.name: ticker.client.type
properties.description: How the collector checks this target: SPRING (actuator health + curated metrics) or HTTP (plain GET, 2xx = up).

properties.name: ticker.client.tags
properties.description: Free-form tags shown on the tile (e.g. team, environment).

properties.name: ticker.client.heartbeat-interval
properties.description: Periodic re-registration so a collector restart repopulates the wall. <= 0 disables the heartbeat.

properties.name: ticker.client.deregister-on-shutdown
properties.description: Deregister from the collector on graceful shutdown, so rolling deploys clean up their old instances (deploys are not incidents). A crash skips this and correctly stays on the wall as DOWN.

properties.name: ticker.client.exclude-actuator-requests
properties.description: Drop /actuator requests from this app's http.server.requests metric, so requests/sec, latency and error rate show REAL traffic instead of the collector's polling and k8s probes. Default on; set false to count actuator traffic again.
